movie.synopsis: KGF 2 (2022) : The blood-soaked land of Kolar Gold Fields (KGF) has a new overlord now – Rocky, whose name strikes fear in the heart of his foes. His allies look up to Rocky as their Savior, the government sees him as a threat to law and order; enemies are clamoring for revenge and conspiring for his downfall. Bloodier battles and darker days await as Rocky continues on his quest for unchallenged supremacy.
